book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called the cambridge belfry
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 5 nights starting from friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should be in the north
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 13:30 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 12:30
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
